name: Oatburgers with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered saucepan, sauté the first four ingredients until the vegetables are tender.
2. Meanwhile, bring all other ingredients (except oats) to a boil in a large pot.
3. Lower heat and add the sautéed vegetables, incorporating them gradually by stirring gently after each cup of oats is added.
4. Continue cooking for up to five minutes or until the mixture starts to stick slightly to the bottom of the pot.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely before proceeding (at least 10-15 minutes).
6. Form the cooled mixture into patties and place them on an oiled cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, turning once around the 20-minute mark.
8. Makes about 20-25 burgers.
Oatburgers lend themselves to many variations. Some further suggestions include using dill, parsley, celery, or green or red peppers in place of mushrooms.
